title: Sol's Item Rarity
description: Adds a fully configurable rarity tier system to all items in Minecraft! Assign rarity tiers to any item from vanilla Minecraft or any mod, and watch as they gain special effects, custom item slot borders, attribute bonuses, and more!
body: # Sol’s Item Rarity Mod (Forge 1.16.5 & 1.20.1) **Advanced RPG Rarity System | Attribute Scaling | Fully Configurable** **Author:** solmochi **Recommended Addon:** [Sol’s Relic System](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/sols-relic-system) ## Support **Need help, want to suggest a feature, or found a bug?** **Join our community to catch exclusive early previews and upcoming changelogs before they go live!** [![Join Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-Join_Server-5865F2?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=white)](https://discord.com/invite/PzYsNxanTA) *** ## **Turn Minecraft Into a True RPG Experience** Sol’s Item Rarity Mod adds a **fully customizable RPG-style rarity system** to Minecraft. Every weapon, armor piece, and item can have **unique rarity tiers, stat bonuses, animated visuals, and persistent attributes**. * Randomized loot progression * Scalable item stats * Works with ALL mods * Fully configurable JSON system * Multiplayer-ready (server sync supported) *** ## Key Features ### **Dynamic Rarity System** * Weapons & armor **roll random rarity on first use** * Items store rarity using **NBT (persistent per item instance)** * Same item can have **different rarities** ### **Visual Enhancements** * Animated **chroma item names** * **Rarity-colored inventory & hotbar borders** * Multi-layer UI effects (glow, bevel, sparkle for high tiers) * Tooltip borders match rarity ### **Attribute Scaling System** * Items gain **stat bonuses based on rarity** * Fully configurable multipliers * Auto-applies stats to **all weapons & armor (including modded)** ### **Fully Configurable** * JSON-based configs for: * Rarity chances * Fixed rarities * Attributes * Set-based items * Works with **any mod using `modid:itemname`** ### **Multiplayer Support** * Server configs **auto-sync to all players** * `/sr reload` updates everyone instantly * No client-side desync issues *** ## **Rarity Tiers** | Tier |Multiplier |Effects | | --------- |---------- |----------------- | | Common |1.0x |No effects | | Uncommon |1.15x |Light chroma | | Rare |1.25x |Enhanced color | | Epic |1.5x |Strong chroma | | Legendary |2.0x |Animated borders | | Mythical |3.0x |High-tier visuals | | Supreme |5.0x |Maximum effects | |   | | | *** ## **How It Works** ### Random Rarity (Weapons & Armor) * Rolls when first held * Stored permanently in NBT * Higher rarity = stronger stats ### **Fixed Rarity (Items & Materials)** * Uses built-in + custom configs * Ideal for rare drops, boss items, and special materials *** ## **Priority System** Rarity is assigned in this order: 1. SetID fixed rarity 2. Custom / internal fixed rarity 3. SetID rarity pool 4. Item rarity pool 5. Auto-detected weapon/armor 6. Default fallback *** ## **SetID System (Custom Loot)** Create boss drops and unique gear: /give [@p](https://github.com/p) minecraft:diamond\_sword{SetID:"boss\_drop"} 1 Supports: * Fixed rarity * Custom rarity pools * Custom attributes *** ## **Auto-Attributes** All gear automatically gains bonuses: * Swords → Damage + Speed * Armor → Health + Armor * Boots → Movement Speed * Shields → Knockback Resistance * Works without config * Scales with rarity *** ## **[Sol’s Relic System](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/sols-relic-system) Integration** Enhances gameplay with: * Gear leveling * Sub-stats * Crit mechanics * Set bonuses Compatibility: * No hard dependency required * Automatically disables overlapping stats * Uses reflection detection *** ## **Configuration** Located in: .minecraft/config/solsitemrarity/ Main files: * `rarity_chances.json` * `custom_rarities.json` * `rarity_attributes.json` * `setid_*` configs Full guide included in `_instruction.txt` *** ## Commands | Command |Description | | ---------- |----------------- | | /sr reload |Reload configs | | /sr info |View rarity stats | | /sr help |Show help menu | |   | | *** ## **Installation** 1. Install Minecraft Forge 2. Download the mod `.jar` 3. Place it in `/mods` folder 4. Launch Minecraft *** ## Mod Compatibility * Works with ALL mods * Auto-detects weapons & armor * Supports modded items via config *** ## Support Join the Discord: [![Join Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-Join_Server-5865F2?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=white)](https://discord.com/invite/PzYsNxanTA) *** ## License All Rights Reserved © solmochi *** ## Final Note If you want: * RPG progression * Loot rarity systems * Scalable gear stats * Better item visuals This mod is built for you.
